prompt: I'm recording video evidence of an iOS feature test. What's the right way to start and stop video recording? What mistakes should I avoid?
expected_output: Response should invoke ios-simulator-control and explain: (1) 'xcrun simctl io $UDID recordVideo output.mp4 &' with & to background. (2) After exercising app: 'kill -INT $PID' (SIGINT, not SIGKILL). (3) Explicitly flag: DO NOT use 'kill -9' or SIGKILL — corrupts video file. Reference lines 97, 235, 262. Should also mention: capture $! before backgrounding to save PID.
